description: Queen Patch 13 (4 June 2020) — Arena Changes, Solo Randomized Dungeon Availability, Smart Cluster Queue Adjustments, Disarray Threshold Changes, Improvements, Fixes.

sections.heading: Arena Changes and Fixes
sections.searchable_text: Arena Rewards Fame Bonus win 20000 40000 Healers 10000 Tome of Insight Adventurer's Challenge points 1000 Signup UI daily rewards healer roles timer Match Ready popup

subsections.heading: Arena Reward Changes
subsections.searchable_text: Arena Fame Bonus win 20000 40000 Healers 10000 Tome of Insight Adventurer Challenge 1000 points

changes.raw_text: Fame Bonus per win: 20,000 → 40,000. Healers now get an additional 10,000 Fame per win via an additional Tome of Insight. An Arena win now also gives 1,000 Adventurer's Challenge points.
notes: Healers now get an additional 10,000 Fame per win via an additional Tome of Insight
An Arena win now also gives 1,000 Adventurer's Challenge points

sections.heading: Increased Availability of Blue and Yellow Zone Solo Randomized Dungeons
sections.description: When a player enters a Solo Randomized Dungeon in a blue or yellow zone and no other player uses the portal within a certain time, the entry portal will disappear while the player is still inside. Players inside can remain and use the exit or A-ability to leave. Once a given entry portal is removed, a new one will spawn elsewhere, increasing the overall number of fresh dungeons in these zones.
sections.searchable_text: Solo Randomized Dungeons blue yellow zone portal disappear fresh availability exit A-ability respawn

sections.heading: Smart Cluster Queue Adjustments
sections.description: Players waiting to enter a cluster via the Smart Cluster Queue now also add to the total Disarray headcount in the cluster for which they are queueing.
sections.searchable_text: Smart Cluster Queue Disarray headcount queueing cluster players waiting

sections.heading: Disarray Strength Adjustments
sections.description: The effects of Disarray (zerg debuff) no longer accelerate as quickly with higher player numbers. Affected attributes: Bonus Damage vs. Players, CC Duration vs. Players, Received Healing.
sections.searchable_text: Disarray Strength Adjustments zerg debuff player threshold Bonus Damage CC Duration Received Healing escalation

subsections.heading: Disarray Threshold Table
subsections.searchable_text: Disarray Zerg Debuff player threshold new old effective debuff table

notes: Disarray no longer accelerates as quickly at higher player counts

sections.heading: Improvements
items: When a building upgrade requires a Destiny Board node unlock, the error message now offers to show the required unlock
White Direboars have been washed and now appear brighter
sections.searchable_text: Improvements building upgrade Destiny Board error message unlock White Direboar brighter

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Fixed broken terrain in Bleachskull Steppe and Meltwater Channel (players in these zones when the patch is deployed will be moved to the nearest exit)
Fixed an issue where Resource Return Rate percentages did not display for some languages
Fixed an issue where Hideout item recovery was not available for Hideouts lost due to lack of food during downtimes
Correct Season 8 winner banner now displays in cities
Tooltips reworded for clarity or corrected for: Fearless Strike / Charge (Claymore), Soulless Stream (Galatine Pair), Spinning Blades (Dual Swords), Deep Leap (One-handed Mace)
Additional minor localization, UI, audio, animation, and terrain fixes
